overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in green wizard robes exploring a vast, ornate gothic library with dark wood bookshelves, spiral staircases, and arched windows. The character moves through the grand main hall, narrow corridors, and intimate side rooms, passing other students and examining detailed architectural elements in a magical academic setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand library hall with reading tables and spiral staircase

events.description: character looks up at the vaulted ceiling and upper balcony architecture
approaching the central spiral staircase and antique globe display

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the main library hall, observing the tall bookshelves and ornate architecture

notable_agents.action: two students standing near the back wall by the bookshelves

entered.detail: tall wooden spiral staircase connecting upper and lower levels
long wooden tables with books and reading lamps
floor-to-ceiling dark wood bookcases filled with volumes
tall gothic arched windows with iron grilles
ornate iron chandelier hanging from vaulted ceiling
large terrestrial globe on wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast gothic library hall with soaring vaulted ceilings and dark wood architecture. The camera pans up to reveal upper balconies and an ornate iron chandelier, then continues forward past wooden reading tables toward a prominent spiral staircase and antique globe display where other students stand in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark wood-paneled corridor between tall bookcases

events.description: moving from open main hall into darker enclosed corridor section
passing close by a female NPC standing near the bookshelves

agents.ego_description: moving from the grand hall into a narrower corridor lined with dark wood paneling and caged bookshelves

notable_agents.action: woman in dark robes standing beside bookshelf examining books

entered.detail: tall dark mahogany bookcases with leather-bound volumes
decorative wrought iron gate with circular patterns
wooden bookcase with iron bars protecting rare books

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the bright open hall into a darker, narrower corridor with dark wood paneling and protective iron gates. A woman stands examining books on the left as the character passes by, moving deeper into the enclosed library space with caged bookshelves.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony with large arched windows overlooking lower level

events.description: moving into area with natural light streaming through large arched windows
beginning descent down wooden staircase to lower level

agents.ego_description: walking along the balcony past large arched windows and descending a wooden staircase with ornate railings

entered.detail: tall arched windows with intricate ironwork allowing natural light
ornate carved wooden balustrade along balcony edge
curved wooden stairs with polished handrails
decorative carved post at stair landing

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a balcony area illuminated by natural light from large arched windows. The space opens up with ornate wooden railings overlooking the lower level, and the character descends a curved wooden staircase with detailed carved newel posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: small private study room with desk and artifacts

events.description: entering small side room from the main corridor
approaching desk with celestial globe and examining the portrait on the wall

agents.ego_description: entering a small intimate study room and examining the artifacts on the desk and the portrait above it

entered.detail: antique wooden writing desk with papers and books
brass and wood astronomical globe on desk
framed oil portrait of a bearded man in academic robes
brass wall-mounted lamp with warm light
tall rectangular mirror in wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small, carpeted study room through an arched doorway. The room contains a wooden desk with a celestial globe and scattered books, a large portrait of a bearded academic on the wall, and warm lighting from wall sconces. The character approaches the desk to examine the items before turning to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level corridor with display cases and portraits

events.description: moving through dimly lit corridor illuminated by wall sconces and distant light
approaching a figure standing near a display case at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper corridor past framed paintings and glass display cases, approaching a distant figure

notable_agents.action: figure in robes standing near display case examining artifacts

entered.detail: series of framed oil paintings lining the corridor walls
glass and wood case displaying artifacts
brass lantern suspended from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dimly lit upper corridor with red walls adorned with framed portraits. Wall sconces and a hanging lantern provide warm illumination. The character passes glass display cases and approaches a figure standing at the far end of the corridor near another arched doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: small study room with large portrait and desk

events.description: entering final small room through arched doorway
approaching large portrait above the wooden desk

agents.ego_description: entering a small study room and approaching the desk to examine the large portrait and book stacks

entered.detail: prominent framed portrait of a robed figure above the desk
stacks of leather-bound books on the desk surface

segments.scene_description: The character enters a final small study room through an arched doorway, revealing a space with dark wood paneling and a large portrait hanging above a wooden desk. The character approaches the desk, which is stacked with books, to examine the prominent portrait on the wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a grand gothic library that transitions from vast, open halls into a series of intimate, dimly lit study rooms. It begins by panning up toward vaulted ceilings and ornate chandeliers in a bright main hall before moving past reading tables and a spiral staircase toward a narrower, darker corridor lined with iron gates and caged bookshelves. As the camera emerges onto a sunlit balcony with arched windows, it descends a carved wooden staircase and passes through an arched doorway into a warm, carpeted study featuring a celestial globe and a large academic portrait. The scene then shifts into a dimly lit upper corridor with red walls and framed portraits, moving past glass display cases toward a final arched entrance. Finally, the camera enters a secluded study room with dark wood paneling, coming to a rest as it approaches a desk stacked with books to examine a prominent portrait on the wall.
